feat.name: Jotun's Heart
feat.text: You have unlocked the power of a true giant within you. Your size becomes Huge. You have a 10-foot reach. Your maximum Hit Points increase by your level.

traits.name: Jotunborn
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the jotunborn ancestry. Jotunborn are large people forged from the blood of an ancient group of giants called titans and usually have low-light vision. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by jotunborn. A weapon with this trait is created and used by jotunborn.

feat.special: When you enter Jotun’s Battle Stance, instead of its previous effects, it now increases the reach of any weapon you are wielding, or your fist unarmed attack, by 5 feet.
